case_title: TERRI LYNN DAWSON VS. JAMES WHEELER

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES $7,885,343.61 PRINCIPAL, $4,777,368.57 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,662,936.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES

AMENDED APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES

MOTION FOR ORDER TO ASSIGN RIGHT TO PAYMENT OF INSURANCE POLICY LOAN VALUE, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED
DECLARATION OF MARTIN D. GOODMAN RE INTEREST CALCULATION IN SUPPORT OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWSON, TERRI LYNN AS PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ROBERT DAWSON, DECEASED
ORDER ASSIGNMENT ORDER [ GRANTED BY COMMISSIONER HEWLETT]
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES
